name: Summer Vegetable Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Wash and slice the squash. Add to the skillet and cook until tender, about 15-20 minutes.
3. Thinly slice green onions and bell pepper. Add them to the skillet.
4. Coarsely chop the tomato and add it along with salt, chili powder, and sugar.
5. Cook for a few more minutes, just until the tomatoes are soft.
6. Serve over hot cooked rice.
